name: SCARS
description: SCARS is a fast-paced 2D arcade racing game focused on instant action and precision driving. Take control of a compact turbo city car in high-intensity races across urban streets, night circuits, and futuristic tracks. Simple controls, sharp drifting, and strategic boosts are key to outpacing opponents. The game features clean stylized 2D cartoon visuals with strong visual impact and smooth animations. Unlock new cars, upgrade performance, and climb the global leaderboards through increasingly challenging and high-speed races.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
